---
title: 'catalog pull'
---

Pull the active catalog's commits and annex content from its configured remote(s).

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog pull
```

This command takes no command-specific options.

## Example

```bash
xorq catalog pull
```

## See also

- [`catalog push`](push.qmd) — push to remote(s)
- [`catalog sync`](sync.qmd) — pull then push
